one_time_description: Land lease revenue recognized from 150-year lease agreement valued at $60,000,000 signed in 2023 with Kwaw-Kwaw-Apilt Development LP; $401,096 recognized in 2024 (first year of recognition)
economic_notes: First Nation participates in Centre Creek LP (real property acquisition/management), Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry LP (forestry activities), Kwaw-Kwaw-Apilt Development LP (residential and commercial land development - 150-year lease valued at $60M), Western Indigenous Pipeline Group (via Kwaw-kwaw-Apilt Pipeline LP, no activity yet), and construction business (Kwaw-kwaw-Apilt Framing LP, no activity yet). Ch-ihl-Kway Tribe Society operates property rental and management.
notes: Prior year (2023) restated: accounts payable reduced by $2,000,000 and net financial assets increased by $2,000,000 due to error correction. Deferred revenue of $59,598,904 relates to a 150-year land lease agreement valued at $60M with wholly-owned Kwaw-Kwaw-Apilt Development LP; corresponding $58,700,000 advance to related party on asset side creates an unusual gross-up of the balance sheet. RBC term loan of $750,000 matured April 30, 2024 and was repaid May 15, 2024 (subsequent event). Ottawa Trust Funds of $14,873 held by Government of Canada under Indian Act. No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements. Honoraria of $43,400 paid (likely to Chief and Council). Three GBEs/partnerships have no recorded activity yet (Pipeline LP, Framing LP). Segmented information includes a 2022 comparative column.
